findings.message: Pod 'pod-with-hostpid' uses host process namespace (hostPID: true). This allows containers to see and interact with all processes on the host system, potentially compromising host security. Remove or set to false.

Pod 'pod-with-hostipc' uses host IPC namespace (hostIPC: true). This allows containers to access host inter-process communication mechanisms, potentially compromising host security. Remove or set to false.

Pod 'pod-with-hostnetwork' uses host network namespace (hostNetwork: true). This allows containers to access host network interfaces and services, potentially compromising host security. Remove or set to false.

Pod 'pod-with-all-host-namespaces' uses host process namespace (hostPID: true). This allows containers to see and interact with all processes on the host system, potentially compromising host security. Remove or set to false.
